description: PR3 scenario #4 — warm-start falls back when a baseline entry becomes infeasible. One baseline slot clashes with a prayer window; the planner must skip retention for that section, score candidates normally, pick a legal slot, and record the baseline's rejection (PRAYER_WINDOW_CLASH) as one of the alternatives in its trace. The other sections retain baseline.
notes: The baseline's infeasibility reason (PRAYER_WINDOW_CLASH) is itself a recorded alternative in the moved section's trace — so the registrar can see why the previous placement no longer works.
